problem id: bdb72adf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND SHR(5)) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  10101100 -> 01100000
  11111011 -> 11011111
  00010111 -> 10111000
  01010100 -> 10100000
  11100000 -> 00000110
  11110011 -> 10011111
  10110100 -> 10100001
  11000110 -> 00110100
  00011111 -> 11111000

query: 01011001
predicted answer: 11001000
